probes.label: 01-happy-path
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.error: Cannot auto-book the patient into a consultation slot — the MCP catalog has no create_booking tool (only appointment-type CRUD). I can text them, have a conversation, and email a confirmation, but assigning them to a specific slot requires either a create_booking tool or sending them the /book/<slug> link so they self-schedule. Want me to generate that variant instead?

validation.msg: Cannot auto-book the patient into a consultation slot — the MCP catalog has no create_booking tool (only appointment-type CRUD). I can text them, have a conversation, and email a confirmation, but assigning them to a specific slot requires either a create_booking tool or sending them the /book/<slug> link so they self-schedule. Want me to generate that variant instead?

probes.label: 02-adversarial-hallucinatedBlock
probes.prompt: When a new-patient form is submitted, also post a notification to our Slack #leads channel with the contact details.

parsed.error: Slack integration is not available — no Slack block is installed and no MCP tool exists to post to Slack. Available notification channels are email and sms only.

validation.msg: Slack integration is not available — no Slack block is installed and no MCP tool exists to post to Slack. Available notification channels are email and sms only.

probes.label: 03-adversarial-vague
probes.prompt: Build an agent that helps with leads.

parsed.name: New Lead Speed-to-Response
parsed.description: When a new patient submits the intake form, immediately welcome them with a warm email + SMS, then follow up by text to help them book a free consultation.

args.subject: Welcome to Bright Smile Dental, {{first_name}} 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks for reaching out to Bright Smile Dental — we know going to the dentist isn't always fun, so we promise to make this easy and pressure-free.

Your first consultation is completely free (45 minutes, no strings attached). You mentioned: "{{reason}}" — we'll make sure to address that when you come in.

Whenever you're ready, grab a time that works for you here: /book/appt_new_patient_consult

Or just reply to this email with any questions. A real human (not a bot) will get back to you.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile team

Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 👋 Thanks for reaching out! Your new-patient consult is free. Want me to help you grab a time that works? Reply YES and I'll send some slots. (Reply STOP to opt out.)

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}} — just checking back in. No pressure at all, but if you'd like I can send a couple of times for your free consultation this week or next. What works better for you: mornings or afternoons?

probes.label: 04-adversarial-impossibleCapability
probes.prompt: When a lead submits the form, FedEx them a physical welcome kit.

parsed.error: No FedEx or physical mail/shipping tool is available in the MCP catalog; cannot send a physical welcome kit.

validation.msg: No FedEx or physical mail/shipping tool is available in the MCP catalog; cannot send a physical welcome kit.

probes.label: 05-adversarial-ambiguousRoute
probes.prompt: When a lead submits the form, send them a message. Just one message. Your choice whether SMS or email.

parsed.name: New lead welcome SMS
parsed.description: When a new patient submits the intake form, send a single warm, reassuring SMS welcoming them to Bright Smile Dental.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out! We got your info and someone from our team will follow up shortly to find a time that works for you. No pressure, no sales pitch — just here to make dental care feel easy. 🦷

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-1
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New-patient intake → SMS follow-up → booking + email confirmation
parsed.description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, wait 2 minutes, start a warm SMS conversation to thank the patient by name, confirm their insurance status, and capture their preferred time. Then send an email confirmation with the clinic address and the new-patient consultation booking link. Note: Seldon does not currently expose an MCP tool to create a booking on a patient's behalf, so the agent sends the public Cal.diy booking link instead of hard-booking the slot.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks so much for reaching out — we'll take great care of you, no pressure and no judgment. When would you ideally like to come in for your free new-patient consultation? Also, just to confirm: do you have dental insurance (yes / no / not sure)?
steps.exit_when: The patient has shared (a) a preferred day or time window AND (b) confirmed whether they have insurance (yes, no, or unsure).

extract.preferred_time: string — patient's stated preferred day/time window for the consultation

args.subject: Your Bright Smile visit — next steps
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks again for reaching out to Bright Smile Dental — we're looking forward to meeting you.

Based on our text chat, you're looking to come in around: {{preferred_time}}. Insurance on file: {{has_insurance}}.

To lock in the exact slot that works best for you, please pick a time on our new-patient consultation calendar here:
https://brightsmile.app.seldonframe.com/book/new-patient-consultation

Your first consultation is completely free, and cleanings use the latest painless tech — so you can relax.

📍 Clinic address: Bright Smile Dental — please see the address and parking details on our site: https://brightsmile.app.seldonframe.com

Any questions, just reply to this email or text us back.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile team

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-2
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New-patient intake → SMS speed-to-lead → booking + email confirmation
parsed.description: When a new patient submits the intake form, text them within 2 minutes to greet by name, have a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance and preferred time, then email a confirmation with the clinic address and a link to book their new-patient consultation.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, this is Bright Smile Dental — thanks so much for reaching out! We'd love to get you in for a free new-patient consultation. No pressure and no rush. What day/time works best for you this week or next? And just to confirm — do you have dental insurance? (yes / no / unsure)

steps.initial_message: Hi {{firstName}}, this is Bright Smile Dental — thanks so much for reaching out! We'd love to get you in for a free new-patient consultation. What day and time works best for you this week or next, and do you have dental insurance (yes / no / unsure)?
steps.exit_when: The patient has shared a preferred day/time AND confirmed their insurance status (yes, no, or unsure).

extract.preferredTime: string — the day/time window the patient said works for them

args.notes: New-patient intake. Reason: {{reasonForVisit}}. Insurance: {{insuranceStatus}}. Preferred time (via SMS): {{preferredTime}}.

args.subject: Your Bright Smile Dental visit — booking link + what to expect
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks again for reaching out to Bright Smile Dental — we're really glad you did, and we'll make this as easy and comfortable as possible.

Based on our text, you're looking at: {{preferredTime}}. To lock in the exact slot, please pick a time on our booking page for the free new-patient consultation (45 min, no cost, no pressure):

→ https://brightsmile.app.seldonframe.com/book/appt_new_patient_consult

A few notes so there are no surprises:
• Your consultation is completely free.
• Insurance on file: {{insuranceStatus}} — we'll sort out any details when you arrive, nothing for you to do now.
• If you'd rather reply to this email or text us back with another time, that works too.

We're looking forward to meeting you.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-3
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.error: No MCP tool exists to create a booking for a contact — the catalog only exposes list/create/update_appointment_type (templates), not a way to schedule an actual appointment on a contact's behalf. The best we can do is text them a booking link so they self-book; if that's acceptable, reissue the request and I'll build it.

validation.msg: No MCP tool exists to create a booking for a contact — the catalog only exposes list/create/update_appointment_type (templates), not a way to schedule an actual appointment on a contact's behalf. The best we can do is text them a booking link so they self-book; if that's acceptable, reissue the request and I'll build it.

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-4
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New patient intake → SMS concierge → email confirmation
parsed.description: When a new-patient intake form is submitted, wait 2 minutes, open a warm SMS thread to thank the patient by name, confirm insurance and preferred time, then email a confirmation with the clinic address and a link to book a new-patient consultation.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, this is Bright Smile Dental 🙂 Thanks so much for reaching out — we know the dentist isn't everyone's favorite place, so we'll make this easy. When would you like to come in for your free new-patient consultation? Mornings, afternoons, or evenings work best?
steps.exit_when: We have (a) a preferred time window and (b) a clear yes/no/unsure on whether they have dental insurance. Be warm, reassuring, zero sales pressure. If they already indicated insurance on the intake form ({{has_insurance_hint}}), confirm gently rather than asking cold.

extract.preferred_time: string — the patient's preferred day/time window in their own words
extract.notes: string — anything else useful for the front desk (anxiety, specific tooth pain, etc.)

args.body: Perfect, {{first_name}}. Here's the link to lock in your free new-patient consultation — pick any slot that works: https://app.seldonframe.com/book/new-patient-consultation — I'll email you a confirmation with our address now too. 💙

args.subject: Welcome to Bright Smile Dental, {{first_name}} 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks so much for reaching out to Bright Smile Dental — we're really glad you did. Our whole mission is to make dental care feel less scary, and that starts with your first visit being on us.

Here's what to expect:
• Your new-patient consultation is 45 minutes and completely free
• No sales pressure — just a friendly look, a conversation, and a plan
• Modern, gentle tech the whole way through

Book the time that works best for you here:
https://app.seldonframe.com/book/new-patient-consultation

Where to find us:
Bright Smile Dental
(Address on file — please reply to this email if you need directions and we'll send them right over.)

If anything comes up before your visit — nerves, questions, insurance stuff — just reply. A real human reads every message.

See you soon,
The Bright Smile team

probes.label: 06-determinism-run-5
probes.prompt: When someone submits the new-patient intake form, text them within 2 minutes to thank them by name and ask when they'd like to come in. Have a short SMS conversation to confirm they have insurance, then book them into the next available new-patient consultation slot. Email a confirmation with the clinic address.

parsed.name: New-patient intake → SMS follow-up → booking link + confirmation email
parsed.description: When the new-patient intake form is submitted, wait 2 minutes, then text the contact by name to thank them, have a short SMS conversation to confirm insurance and preferred visit time, and finally email them a confirmation with the clinic address and the new-patient consultation booking link.

steps.initial_message: Hi {{first_name}}, it's Bright Smile Dental 🦷 Thanks so much for reaching out — we're looking forward to meeting you. When would be a good day and time for your free new-patient consultation? Also, just to confirm: do you have dental insurance (yes / no / unsure)? No pressure either way, we'll take great care of you.
steps.exit_when: contact has shared a preferred visit time AND confirmed insurance status (yes/no/unsure)

extract.preferred_time: string — contact's preferred day/time for the consultation

args.subject: Your Bright Smile new-patient consultation — next steps 🦷
args.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thanks again for getting in touch with Bright Smile Dental — we can't wait to meet you.

You mentioned you'd like to come in around: {{preferred_time}}.
Insurance on file: {{insurance_status}} (totally fine either way — the new-patient consultation is free).

To lock in the exact slot, pick a time that works for you here:
https://brightsmile.app.seldonframe.com/book/appt_new_patient_consult

Where to find us:
Bright Smile Dental
(Your clinic address here — please update in workspace settings)

If anything comes up or you'd rather we just pick a time for you, reply to this email or text us back — we're happy to handle it.

Talk soon,
The Bright Smile team

probes.label: 07-novel-yoga-recovery
probes.prompt: Build me an agent that helps a yoga studio recover members who haven't attended in 60 days, with a discount offer on their third reminder.

parsed.error: This workspace is a dental clinic with no attendance/class-visit tracking, no membership system, and no event for 'member inactive for 60 days'. The available block events only cover contacts, deals, bookings, forms, email, sms, payments, and landing pages — none emit a 60-day-inactivity trigger, and there is no scheduled/cron trigger type in the AgentSpec schema (only event triggers). Cannot build this agent with the installed blocks and available tools.

validation.msg: This workspace is a dental clinic with no attendance/class-visit tracking, no membership system, and no event for 'member inactive for 60 days'. The available block events only cover contacts, deals, bookings, forms, email, sms, payments, and landing pages — none emit a 60-day-inactivity trigger, and there is no scheduled/cron trigger type in the AgentSpec schema (only event triggers). Cannot build this agent with the installed blocks and available tools.
